events.title: World Humanitarian Day
events.summary: Designated by the UN to honour humanitarian workers and those who have lost their lives working for humanitarian causes, while advocating for the safety of aid workers.

events.title: World Photography Day
events.summary: An international celebration of the art, craft, science, and history of photography, encouraging people to share a single photo with the rest of the world.

events.title: International Bow Day
events.summary: A light-hearted celebration of the accessory that can be used in hair, on clothing, or for gift wrapping, often embraced by fashion enthusiasts.
